_README: Reviewed verdicts for House PTR filings the reconciler lists as missing. Each entry documents WHY a filing has no KeyVex rows, so a gap is 'explained' (nil) rather than 'unexplained-missing'. disposition: 'nil_nothing_to_report' | 'nil_amendment' | 'recovered' | 'unreadable'. Reviewed against the upright-rendered government PDF (builder + Greg in the canvas viewer).

8214458.note: Amendment correcting a prior PTR: the CSX sale reported 2013-01-25 was in error (actually 2012-01-25, on the 2012 annual statement). No transaction rows on the form. Confirmed by clean Sonnet OCR at 270 deg (nil=true) and visual review.

9113769.note: 'See attached schedules' filing — grid blank on page 1, 34 real transactions on the attached typed schedule (page 2): 4 Brown Advisory + 23 GS Brokerage muni trades, 3 property LLCs, 3 Morgan Stanley CUSIP holdings, 1831 Michael Faraday twice. Recovered via vision OCR at 270 deg / high-res after teaching the reader the attached-schedule pattern. extraction_method=vision_ocr (not byte-exact). Inserted as house-9113769-ocr-1..34.

_summary.note: All 79 reconciler-missing House filings reviewed against the upright government PDFs. Outcome: 1 recovered (Rooney, 34 trades, vision_ocr), 78 nil (no usable transactions). Reviewer: Greg.
_summary.verification: 78 nil = Greg full visual review + objective OCR spot-check (improved schedule-aware reader, high-res): 8 filings detailed individually + 6 of the 71 Harold Rogers recurring 'nothing to report' PTRs re-OCR'd, all confirmed nil. Rogers files a recurring nothing-to-report PTR, explaining the 71 count. 1 recovered (Rooney, 34 trades). No unexplained-missing remain.
